title: 10 best herbal tinctures for osteoporosis
description: Burdock tinctures helps with osteoporosis because it contains inulin, a prebiotic fiber that promotes gut health and strengthens bones. Inulin also stimulates the immune system to reduce inflammation, which can contribute to bone loss. Additionally, burdock root has been shown to increase calcium absorption and reduce urinary excretion of calcium, both of which are important for maintaining strong bones.
